string.text:
An everyday carry handgun manufactured by SIG Sauer. Chambered in 9x19 caliber, of 10 round capacity. It is commonly carried by ISG members and Mercenaries through the Zone. It's a lightweight option due to its small size and light materials.
 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS:
 %c[d_purple] - %c[ui_gray_2] Scopes: None
 %c[d_purple] - %c[ui_gray_2] Silencer: None
